title: Question re supplementary books
wikitext:
[]: Question re supplementary books             Quote Post by V » Sun Feb 24, 2008 4:22 pm for those of you that own them; how informative are "Groundwork of Evangelion" "Der Mond" and "Newtype 100% Eva collection", what do they say, and would they be worth purchasing?

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Sun Feb 24, 2008 7:39 pm I checked out Der Mond from my library, it's cool but not really worth buying

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Feb 24, 2008 8:15 pm You know what REALLY has a lot of information? Sore wo Nasumono .

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 24, 2008 8:54 pm NAveryW wrote: You know what REALLY has a lot of information? Sore wo Nasumono .

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Feb 24, 2008 8:59 pm I've googled around a bit NAvery and this "Sore wo Nasumono." sounds very interesting; any links you can point me to about it?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 24, 2008 9:18 pm I should add Wiki pages for these damn things sometime. Or maybe somebody else could get started on them.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Feb 24, 2008 9:25 pm I'll get the ball rolling

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Feb 24, 2008 11:48 pm The NewType Filmbooks I have. There are 9 of them, it's in moon, it's like a commentary of the series with notes and pictures. It's not very useful to me since I can't read it.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon Feb 25, 2008 12:01 am if they can be "found" anywhere (THAT BOARD?) a PM would be much appreciated....or at least, the full formal name so I know what I'm lookin' for

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 25, 2008 12:28 am Neon Genesis Evangelion Newtype Film Book 1 thru 9. Boring title. Got them all on the shelf.
